base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of link_magical_shield_equipped_variant — a character (playable) from 1986 legend of zelda. 4-dir × 2-frame walk variant — larger/different shield graphic showing Magical Shield equipped. Replaces default small shield after shop purchase. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 4-dir × 2-frame walk variant — larger/different shield graphic showing Magical Shield equipped. Replaces default small shield after shop purchase
